name: Color Tools
description: Browser-based color pickers, converters, palette and gradient generators.

tools.name: Color Picker
tools.description: Pick any color and get its HEX, RGB, and HSL values.

tools.name: HEX to RGB
tools.description: Convert HEX color codes to RGB values.

tools.name: RGB to HEX
tools.description: Convert RGB values to a HEX color code.

tools.name: HEX to HSL
tools.description: Convert HEX colors to HSL format.

tools.name: HSL to HEX
tools.description: Convert HSL color values to a HEX code.

tools.name: RGB to HSL
tools.description: Convert RGB color values to HSL.

tools.name: RGB to CMYK
tools.description: Convert RGB colors to CMYK for printing.

tools.name: CMYK to RGB
tools.description: Convert CMYK print colors back to RGB.

tools.name: HEX to CMYK
tools.description: Convert a HEX color code to CMYK values.

tools.name: Color Palette Generator
tools.description: Generate harmonious color palettes instantly.

tools.name: Gradient Generator
tools.description: Build CSS linear and radial gradients visually.

tools.name: Color Contrast Checker
tools.description: Check WCAG contrast ratio between two colors.

tools.name: Color Shades Generator
tools.description: Generate darker shades of a base color.

tools.name: Color Tints Generator
tools.description: Generate lighter tints of a base color.

tools.name: Color Wheel
tools.description: Explore complementary and harmony colors on a wheel.

tools.name: Color Mixer
tools.description: Blend two colors and preview the mixed result.

tools.name: Color Blindness Simulator
tools.description: Preview colors as seen with color vision deficiencies.

tools.name: Random Color Generator
tools.description: Generate random colors with their codes.

tools.name: Complementary Color Finder
tools.description: Find the complementary color for any input color.

tools.name: Analogous Color Generator
tools.description: Generate analogous color schemes from a base color.

tools.name: Triadic Color Generator
tools.description: Create triadic three-color harmony schemes.

tools.name: Monochromatic Color Generator
tools.description: Build a single-hue monochromatic palette.

tools.name: Color Name Finder
tools.description: Find the closest named color for any HEX value.

tools.name: CSS Gradient Background Generator
tools.description: Generate copy-paste CSS gradient backgrounds.

tools.name: Box Shadow Generator
tools.description: Build and preview CSS box-shadow code.

tools.name: Text Shadow Generator
tools.description: Create CSS text-shadow effects with live preview.

tools.name: Hex Color to Image
tools.description: Generate a solid color image from a HEX code.

tools.name: Color from Image
tools.description: Pick and extract colors directly from an uploaded image.

tools.name: Hex to RGBA
tools.description: Convert HEX colors to RGBA with an alpha channel.

tools.name: Lighten and Darken Color
tools.description: Adjust a color's lightness up or down by percentage.
